title: heliophila diffusa
intro: Heliophila diffusa, also known as the annual heliophila or Cape marigold, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and fever. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antimicrobial agent, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, heliophila diffusa is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical creams, and is often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
